title: Lyra Checkpoint Download & Conversion
activity_flow: [get_md5_checksum]: collect expected_files from MD5_CHECKSUM_LOOKUP where key starts with 'Lyra/'
YES → check model_dir exists and non-empty → return True (skip download) or False (download required)
NO → for each matching key in MD5_CHECKSUM_LOOKUP:
check file_path exists → if not: return False
compute hashlib.md5 of file → compare to stored hash → if mismatch: return False
Loop over extra_models (currently empty list — no iterations)
[if non-empty]: DECISION model_name=='google-t5/t5-11b' → repo_id=model_name else repo_id='nvidia/{model_name}'
DECISION: checksum failed → mkdir + snapshot_download (all files, no allow_patterns filter)
convert_pixtral_checkpoint_flow: DECISION: save_path exists and size > 0 → print already exists, RETURN (early exit)
Glob *.safetensors in pixtral_ckpt_dir; assert exactly 1 file
vit_ckpt: keys starting with 'vision_encoder.' → strip prefix
projector_ckpt: keys starting with 'vision_language_adapter.' → strip prefix + rename w_in→projector.0, w_out→projector.2
llm_ckpt: remaining keys (not vision_encoder or vision_language_adapter)
Build vlm_ckpt: prefix llm→'model.', projector→'mm_projector.', vit→'vision_encoder.'
Assert vision_encoder_config matches hardcoded vit_config (400M ViT: dim=1024, 24 layers, 16 heads, etc.)
Build llm_config from pixtral_config keys; rename hidden_dim→ffn_hidden_size; set vision_encoder=vit_type
key_decisions: get_md5_checksum: no expected files → directory-existence check only
get_md5_checksum: has expected files → MD5 hash verification per file
main: Lyra checksum fails → trigger snapshot_download
convert_pixtral_checkpoint: output already exists → early return (idempotent)
convert_pixtral_checkpoint: vit config assertion must pass or raise AssertionError
external_dependencies: scripts.download_guardrail_checkpoints.download_guardrail_checkpoints — imported but not called in main flow
important_notes: convert_pixtral_checkpoint is defined and imported but NOT called inside main(); it is available as a utility. The extra_models list is empty so the loop body never executes. Lyra files downloaded: lyra_static.pt and lyra_dynamic.pt from nvidia/Lyra HF repo.
